note: Scheduler adds config, base fields, a service, plugins, hooks and permissions. These cases are all `recipe` (response-graded) and probe Scheduler-specific facts documented under 2.3.x/agent/; no site mutation and no live-state checks.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site using the Scheduler module, which two date/time fields does Scheduler add to the add/edit form of an enabled entity bundle so content can be published and later unpublished automatically? Name the machine names of the fields.
evals.expected_output: Scheduler adds the publish_on and unpublish_on base fields to each enabled entity type/bundle.

evals.prompt: I want to turn on Scheduler for the Article content type only. How is that setting stored in Drupal config, and which key enables the publish date field for that bundle?
evals.expected_output: It is stored as a third-party setting under the `scheduler` namespace on the bundle config entity (e.g. node.type.article.third_party.scheduler), with publish_enable / unpublish_enable turning each field on for that bundle.

evals.prompt: How does Scheduler actually publish content once the scheduled time has passed, and how can I run only Scheduler's processing more frequently than full site cron on a Drupal 11 site? Give the Drush command and/or the URL.
evals.expected_output: Scheduler processes due entities on every Drupal cron run; to run only its work more often use the lightweight cron: `drush scheduler:cron` or the guarded URL /scheduler/cron/{cron_key}.

evals.prompt: In custom PHP on a Drupal 11 Scheduler site, which service should I load to call Scheduler's publish/unpublish engine and read its settings? Give the service id.
I have a custom entity type and want Scheduler to be able to publish/unpublish it. What kind of plugin do I write, and which annotation and base class does it use?
evals.expected_output: Write a SchedulerPlugin (@SchedulerPlugin annotation) in the Plugin/Scheduler namespace, extending \Drupal\scheduler\SchedulerPluginBase, declaring entityType and dependency; then run drush scheduler:entity-update.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 Scheduler site, I want to prevent a scheduled node from being published by cron until an approval field is set. Which Scheduler hook do I implement, and what should it return to block publication?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_scheduler_publishing_allowed() (or the node-specific hook_scheduler_node_publishing_allowed) and return FALSE to block publication; Scheduler retries each cron run until it is allowed.

evals.prompt: Which permission lets an editor set the publish and unpublish dates on the node add/edit form in Scheduler? Give the exact permission name for nodes.
evals.expected_output: The dynamic permission `schedule publishing of nodes` (nodes use the legacy keys; other entity types use their entity type id, e.g. `schedule publishing of media`).
